KNIFEHERO-STEALTH.title: Stealth
KNIFEHERO-STEALTH.description: At the end of your turn, consume a Flag and gain Intangible.
KNIFEHERO-STEALTH.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, consume a Flag and gain Intangible.
KNIFEHERO-CLOSETED.title: Closeted
KNIFEHERO-CLOSETED.description: At the start of your turn, discard a card to prevent the next damage you would take. If you can't, lose Closeted and add a Dazed to your hand. Playing an Attack removes all your Stealth and Closeted.
KNIFEHERO-CLOSETED.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, discard a card to prevent the next damage you would take. If you can't, lose Closeted and add a Dazed to your hand. Playing an Attack removes all your Stealth and Closeted.
KNIFEHERO-DISCOURSED.title: Discoursed
KNIFEHERO-DISCOURSED.description: Gain less energy at the start of your next turn, then this wears off.
KNIFEHERO-DISCOURSED.smartDescription: Gain less energy at the start of your next turn, then this wears off.
KNIFEHERO-EXTREMELY_ONLINE_POWER.title: Extremely Online
KNIFEHERO-EXTREMELY_ONLINE_POWER.descrip: Gain energy at the start of each turn. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-EXTREMELY_ONLINE_POWER.smartDe: Gain energy at the start of each turn. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-PORTAL_TO_THE_KNIFE_DIMENSION_: At the start of each turn, put a copy of a Blade from your deck into your hand. It gains Exhaust and Ethereal.
At the start of each turn, put a copy of a Blade from your deck into your hand. It gains Exhaust and Ethereal.
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_GOLEM_THORNS.title: Pride Golem
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_GOLEM_THORNS.description: Whenever this takes damage, it deals that much damage back to the attacker.
KNIFEHERO-PRIDE_GOLEM_THORNS.smartDescri: Whenever this takes damage, it deals that much damage back to the attacker.
KNIFEHERO-SILENT_PRIDE_POWER.title: Silent Pride
KNIFEHERO-SILENT_PRIDE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, put a Shiv in your discard pile. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-SILENT_PRIDE_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of each turn, put a Shiv in your discard pile. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-IRONCLAD_PRIDE_POWER.title: Ironclad Pride
KNIFEHERO-IRONCLAD_PRIDE_POWER.descripti: Heal 5 HP at the end of combat. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-IRONCLAD_PRIDE_POWER.smartDesc: Heal 5 HP at the end of combat. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-REGENT_PRIDE_POWER.title: Regent Pride
KNIFEHERO-REGENT_PRIDE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, deal 6 damage to an enemy and gain 6 Block. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-REGENT_PRIDE_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of each turn, deal 6 damage to an enemy and gain 6 Block. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-WATCHER_PRIDE_POWER.title: Watcher Pride
KNIFEHERO-WATCHER_PRIDE_POWER.descriptio: At the start of each turn, add Retain to a random card in your hand. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-WATCHER_PRIDE_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of each turn, add Retain to a random card in your hand. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-DEFECT_PRIDE_POWER.title: Defect Pride
KNIFEHERO-DEFECT_PRIDE_POWER.description: Powers cost 1 less. Draw a card whenever you play a Power. This is a Flag.
KNIFEHERO-DEFECT_PRIDE_POWER.smartDescri: Powers cost 1 less. Draw a card whenever you play a Power. This is a Flag.
Your Shivs hit all enemies this turn.
Your Shivs hit all enemies this turn.
KNIFEHERO-LESSON.title: Lesson
KNIFEHERO-LESSON.description: What you have learned. Needed (with Grief) to process your parts, and spent by some cards.
KNIFEHERO-LESSON.smartDescription: What you have learned. Needed to process your parts, and spent by some cards.
KNIFEHERO-MARGINALIA_POWER.title: Marginalia
KNIFEHERO-MARGINALIA_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Book or a Power, gain 1 Lesson.
KNIFEHERO-MARGINALIA_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you play a Book or a Power, gain 1 Lesson.
KNIFEHERO-POLYMATH_POWER.title: Polymath
KNIFEHERO-POLYMATH_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain Lessons.
KNIFEHERO-POLYMATH_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of each turn, gain Lessons.
KNIFEHERO-GRIEF.title: Grief
KNIFEHERO-GRIEF.description: Accumulated grief — a part of you that aches. Some cards make you lose HP equal to your Grief; others (Wallow) turn it into Block. Process a Throbbing Heart to reset it.
KNIFEHERO-GRIEF.smartDescription: Grief: some cards lose you HP equal to it; some turn it into Block.
KNIFEHERO-WHOLENESS.title: Wholeness
KNIFEHERO-WHOLENESS.description: You have mended this many parts. Each grants +2 max HP. At the start of your turn, heal HP equal to your Wholeness.
KNIFEHERO-WHOLENESS.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, heal Wholeness HP.
